label: run_scheduler_modal
translation_notes: Modal primitive → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with controlled open/onOpenChange
Local useState (horizon, linesChecked, includeForecast, submitting) → useForm (react-hook-form) + zodResolver schema with min-1-line validation
Mock PEXT_LINES array → Drizzle query `db.select().from(productionLines).where(eq(lines.active, true))` in Server Component loader
Hardcoded setTimeout fake submit → Server Action `runOptimizerAction(formData)` calling solver microservice with RBAC guard (role IN ['Planner','Admin'])
Emit outbox event `scheduler.run.requested` on submit success
Hardcoded optimizer version string → read from `feature_flags` table key `allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2`
Hardcoded labels (e.g. '7 days (default)', 'P2' pill) → next-intl keys `scheduler.run.horizon.*`

label: override_assignment_modal
translation_notes: Modal size='wide' → Dialog with className max-w-3xl in DialogContent
Allergen incompatibility computed inline (wo.allergen.includes) → derive from changeover_matrix join in loader; pass as `allergenConflict: boolean` prop to avoid client-side matrix lookups
Reason code dropdown hardcoded options → reference data table `override_reason_codes` with i18n labels
Impact preview section (new CO before/after delta) → compute server-side via `getChangeoverImpact(fromLine, toLine, allergenFrom, allergenTo)` helper and stream back to client
Fake submit setTimeout → Server Action `overrideAssignmentAction` with V-SCHED-02/03/04 validator, audit log write, outbox `scheduler.assignment.overridden`
Blocked/allergenIncompat state → enforce hard block in Server Action, not just UI; return structured error for toast display
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `scheduler.override.*`

label: reschedule_wo_modal
translation_notes: FA-line eligibility mock array → derive from `fa_line_compatibility` join table in Server Component; pass `eligibleLineIds: string[]` as prop
Modal size='wide' → Dialog with className max-w-3xl
Acknowledgement checkbox for ineligible line → must be recorded in audit log as explicit user acceptance; add `ack_override_reason` field to Server Action payload
useForm validation: `isEligible || ackIneligible` → zod `.superRefine()` cross-field rule matching V-SCHED-03
Fake submit → Server Action `rescheduleWOAction` with cascade dependency check (V-SCHED-04 no overlap) + outbox `scheduler.wo.rescheduled`
Shift window constraint on datetime-local → enforce in Server Action using shift_definitions table, return field error on violation
Hardcoded reason codes → reference data table; next-intl for labels

label: approve_all_modal
translation_notes: Modal primitive → Dialog; size='default' maps to max-w-lg DialogContent
Hardcoded count prop → pass as `draftCount: number` derived from server query `db.select().from(schedulerAssignments).where(eq(assignments.status,'draft'))` scoped to run group
Fake submit → Server Action `approveAllAssignmentsAction(runGroupId)` with RBAC (Planner Advanced or Scheduling Officer); bulk UPDATE + outbox emit `scheduler.assignment.approved` × N
Summary rows component → shadcn Table or simple dl/dt/dd; move to shared `<SummaryList>` component for reuse across modals
Alert ('bulk action approves from all runs') → persist as permanent warning text, not dismissible, because it describes a data contract
Emit single batched outbox event `scheduler.assignments.bulk_approved` with array payload instead of N individual events
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `scheduler.approveAll.*`

label: matrix_cell_edit_modal
translation_notes: Modal primitive → Dialog; dynamic title `${from} → ${to}${lineId ? ' · '+lineId : ''}` computed from URL params or prop

segregation checkbox disabled for Planner role → enforce role check server-side in Server Action `updateMatrixCellAction`; field should be hidden entirely for Planner (not just disabled) per RBAC V-CM-04
V-CM-02 validation (minutes int ≥ 0) → zod schema `z.number().int().min(0)` with refinement warning >120
Fake save (onSave callback) → Server Action that writes to `changeover_matrix_cells` staging table and creates a pending version draft; no immediate publish
Notes field → store in `changeover_matrix_cells.notes` column; add 500-char max validation
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `matrix.cell.*`
Add confirmation step when `segregation_required` toggled true — separate admin-only modal guard

label: matrix_publish_modal
translation_notes: New version number computed inline as `parseInt(lastVersion.slice(1)) + 1` → derive from DB sequence or `MAX(version_number) + 1` in Server Action `publishMatrixVersionAction`
Summary rows (cells modified, per-line overrides) → Server Action returns diff summary before confirming; render in Dialog before final commit
Version notes textarea → store in `changeover_matrix_versions.notes` column
Warning 'affects next scheduler run' → inform UI that runs currently in-progress are unaffected (version_id snapshot at run start)
Outbox event `changeover_matrix.version.published` with new version_id and summary stats
Hardcoded PEXT_MATRIX_VERSIONS → Drizzle query for latest version metadata
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `matrix.publish.*`

label: matrix_import_modal
translation_notes: 3-stage state machine (upload | validate | preview) → implement with useReducer; upload stage triggers Server Action `validateMatrixCSVAction` returning { rows, errors, diff }
Dropzone div with onClick → replace with shadcn-compatible drag-and-drop using react-dropzone or HTML5 File API; enforce 5 MB / 10,000 row limits server-side
Simulated parsing delay (setTimeout) → real CSV parse on server with Papa.parse or built-in Node stream; stream progress via Server-Sent Events if >1,000 rows
Preview diff table (current vs new, change badge) → server returns typed `MatrixDiff[]`; render with color-coded cells matching heatmap legend
V-CM-01..V-CM-04 validation displayed inline → map server error array to field-level feedback in preview table row
Apply import → Server Action `applyMatrixImportAction(draftId)` that promotes validated staging rows to active draft version
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `matrix.import.*`
known_bugs: BL-PEXT-09: diff rows are sample data, not real diff vs historical version

label: matrix_diff_modal
translation_notes: Modal size='fullpage' → Dialog with className max-w-6xl or a Sheet (full-width slide-over) for wide diff tables
Hardcoded diff rows → Server Action or loader `getMatrixVersionDiff(versionId, activeVersionId)` returning typed `MatrixCellDiff[]`
Color-coded diff cells (yellow for changed, green for added) → CSS classes applied based on diff type field; extract to shared `<DiffCell>` component
Delta column (±Nm string) → compute server-side as `override_min - default_min`; color-code red for positive delta, green for negative
Add download-as-CSV button for the diff table using a Server Action streaming CSV response
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `matrix.diff.*`
known_bugs: BL-PEXT-09: version diff modal shows sample rows, not real diff vs historical

label: forecast_upload_modal
translation_notes: 2-stage state machine (upload | preview) → useReducer with stages; upload triggers Server Action `validateForecastCSVAction` parsing `product_code, week_iso, qty_kg` columns
Dropzone → react-dropzone with .csv/.txt accept filter; enforce 5 MB / 10,000 rows server-side
Overwrite policy radio (replace / keep) → map to `upsert_policy: 'replace' | 'upsert'` param in `uploadForecastAction` Server Action
Preview table (product × week grid) → server returns paginated `ForecastRow[]`; render max 20 rows with '…N more' indicator
V-SCHED-09 retention window validation (3-year) → enforce in Server Action; return field error if week_iso out of range
Emit outbox event `forecast.upload.completed` with coverage summary (weeks, products) on commit
Download CSV template → pre-built static asset at `/files/forecast-template.csv` served from object storage; next-intl keys `forecast.upload.*`

label: disposition_decision_modal
translation_notes: Countdown timer with setInterval → use a server-computed `deadline` timestamp; client renders remaining time via `useInterval` hook against `Date.now()`, avoiding drift from re-renders
'+1h / +4h' extend buttons → Server Action `extendDispositionDeadlineAction(lpId, extensionHours)` updating `disposition_deadline` in DB; revalidate path
Radio card selection (to_stock vs direct_continue) → shadcn RadioGroup with styled card items; selected state via form value not local useState
LP shelf-life display (V-SCHED-10 eligibility) → derive from `lot_palettes.expiry_date` minus `now()` in loader; pass as `shelfLifeHoursRemaining: number`
Default auto-decision 'To Stock' at deadline → implement as background cron job / pg_cron trigger writing to `disposition_decisions` table and emitting outbox event
P2 feature → gate entire modal render behind `feature_flags.disposition_bridge` check in parent; show locked state if disabled
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `disposition.*`; Polish strings must be replaced with i18n tokens
known_bugs: BL-PEXT-03: disposition bridge wiring to notification tray + reminder-after-15min loop is P2

label: rerun_confirm_modal
translation_notes: Modal size='sm' → Dialog with className max-w-md
New run ID preview (OPT-XXXX +1) → server generates actual UUID v7 in `createSchedulerRunAction`; display as 'New Run ID: auto-generated'
Summary rows (source run, horizon, lines) → props derived from `scheduler_runs` row passed from parent; no additional fetch needed
Confirm re-run → Server Action `rerunSchedulerAction(sourceRunId)` cloning input snapshot and enqueuing new solver job
Inform user existing run is unchanged and current schedule remains active → keep as disclaimer text below summary
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `scheduler.rerun.*`

label: disable_v2_modal
translation_notes: Type-to-confirm pattern (type 'DISABLE') → zod schema `z.literal('DISABLE')` with custom error message; Button enabled only when field valid
Destructive button style (btn-danger) → shadcn Button variant='destructive'; note BL-PROD-05: `.btn-danger` missing from shared.css — must be added
Disable v2 → Server Action `disableOptimizerV2Action(auditReason)` toggling `feature_flags.allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2 = false`, writing audit log, emitting outbox `optimizer.v2.disabled`
Audit reason ReasonInput → Textarea with min-length validation via zod `.min(10, ...)`; reason stored in `audit_log.notes`
Fallback rule display → read from `rule_registry` table where id='allergen_sequencing_heuristic_v1'; do not hardcode string
Admin-only action → RBAC guard in Server Action; return 403 for non-admin callers
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `optimizer.disable.*`
known_bugs: BL-PROD-05: .btn-danger referenced in MODAL-SCHEMA but missing from production.css

label: request_review_modal
translation_notes: Modal with dynamic title `${from} → ${to}` → derive allergen pair from URL params or parent state; pass as typed props
Justification textarea min 10 chars → zod `.min(10)` validation; wire to useForm
Submit → Server Action `submitMatrixReviewRequestAction({ allergenFrom, allergenTo, justification })` inserting into `changeover_matrix_reviews` table, sending notification to Admin role
Info block describing BLOCKED state (segregation_required=true) → keep as static content; reference V-CM-04 rule ID
Admin notification on submit → trigger via outbox event `changeover_matrix.review.requested`; admin sees it in notification tray
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `matrix.review.*`

label: pext_dashboard_gantt
translation_notes: Hardcoded DAY_W/HOUR_W/TOTAL_W pixel constants for Gantt positioning → use CSS custom properties and container-query-aware layout; or adopt a Gantt library (e.g. frappe-gantt, bryntum) for production fidelity
All PEXT_ASSIGNMENTS / PEXT_LINES / PEXT_DATES mock data → parallel Drizzle queries in Server Component loader: `schedulerAssignments`, `productionLines`, `calendarDays` for the horizon
runState / runProgress simulation via setInterval → poll Server Action or SSE endpoint `GET /api/scheduler/run/{runId}/status` every 5s; use SWR or TanStack Query
Solver progress phases (greedy seed → local-search → finalize) → real phase data from `scheduler_runs.phase` column or solver SSE stream
pendingActions local state (approve/reject/override per id) → optimistic updates via TanStack Query mutation + Server Action; revalidate `scheduler_assignments` on settle
RBAC: canSeeRunBtn (role check) → derive from session in Server Component; pass as `canRun: boolean` prop
Allergen color legend (PEXT_ALLERGEN_COLORS) → derive from `allergen_types` table with `color_hex` column
BL-PEXT-05: hour-level Gantt zoom toggles state but doesn't re-render finer grid — fix by recomputing HOUR_W and re-rendering lane tracks
BL-PEXT-08: undo-approval 60s window is visual-only — wire real server-side deadline using `approved_at + 60s` with countdown invalidation
known_bugs: BL-PEXT-05: hour-level Gantt zoom toggles state but doesn't re-render finer grid
BL-PEXT-08: undo-approval 60s window is visual-only, no timer countdown

label: assignment_side_panel
translation_notes: Custom `.asn-side` slide-in panel → shadcn Sheet (side='right') with controlled open state
Hardcoded materials list (R-1001, R-1002, R-2101) → fetch from `wo_bom_lines` joined to `materials` table; show `material_code`, `required_qty`, `available_qty` with status pill
Allergen/changeover section → derive CO before/after from `changeover_matrix_cells` join using previous/next WO allergen groups on same line
Approval section with 'Undo approval' link → show only if `approved_at > now() - interval '60 seconds'`; Server Action `undoApprovalAction(assignmentId)` with audit log
DAG dependencies section → query `wo_dependencies` table for parent/child relationships; render as linked list or mini-tree
Status-conditional action buttons (Approve/Reject/Override/Reschedule) → derive from `assignment.status` + session role; disable at Server Action level too
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `assignment.detail.*`
known_bugs: BL-PEXT-08: undo-approval 60s window is visual-only, no timer countdown

label: pext_forecasts_screen
translation_notes: PEXT_FORECASTS mock data → Drizzle query `db.select().from(forecastRows).where(and(between(forecastRows.weekIso, weekFrom, weekTo), sourceFilter))` with pagination
PEXT_FORECAST_WEEKS column headers → derived from query distinct weeks; generate dynamically to support any coverage range
Prophet health card section (prophetEnabled flag) → gate behind `feature_flags.prophet_ml` server-side; read SMAPE/health from `forecast_model_metrics` table
SVG sparkline charts for 4 products → replace with shadcn-compatible chart library (Recharts or Tremor); use real actual-vs-forecast data from `forecast_actuals` table
Source filter (manual/prophet/overridden) → URL search param; Server Component re-fetches on change
Override / Delete row actions → Server Actions `overrideForecastAction` and `deleteForecastRowAction` with audit log; optimistic UI
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `forecast.*`
known_bugs: BL-PEXT-01: full Prophet chart integration with confidence bands and SMAPE per-product drill-down is P2

label: pext_matrix_editor
translation_notes: N×N allergen matrix table rendered with PEXT_ALLERGEN_CODES → Drizzle query `db.select().from(allergenTypes)` for row/column headers; cells from `changeover_matrix_cells` (default + per-line) with edits overlay from session draft
edits local state object → optimistic draft stored in `changeover_matrix_drafts` table per session; Server Action `saveCellDraftAction` on each cell edit; consolidate to version on publish
classifyCell heatmap coloring (none/low/med/high/blocked) → pure utility fn `classifyMatrixCell(minutes: number | 'BLKD'): string` — extract to shared `lib/matrix.ts`
3-tab layout (Default Matrix / Per-Line Overrides / Review Requests) → shadcn Tabs component with URL hash or search param for deep-linking
Per-line overrides accordion (selectedLine toggle) → shadcn Accordion with `AccordionItem` per line; override data from `changeover_matrix_line_overrides` table
Review requests table → Drizzle query `db.select().from(matrixReviewRequests).where(eq(status,'pending'))`; Admin-only Unblock/Reject actions as Server Actions with RBAC
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `matrix.*`; BL-PEXT-06: matrix JSON viewer placeholder link needs a real modal
known_bugs: BL-PEXT-06: matrix JSON viewer modal (View Full Snapshot JSON) is a placeholder link
BL-PEXT-09: version diff modal shows sample rows, not real diff vs historical

label: pext_pending_full_page
translation_notes: PEXT_ASSIGNMENTS mock data → Drizzle query with status filter, line/shift/search params; support URL-driven filtering for deep-links from KPI tiles
Local actions state (approve/reject per id) → optimistic updates with useOptimistic (React 19) or TanStack Query mutation; Server Actions `approveAssignmentAction` / `rejectAssignmentAction`
4 KPI tiles (In queue / Pending / Approved / Overridden) → derived from server aggregation query; avoid waterfall by including counts in same loader fetch
Filter bar (pills + selects + search input) → URL search params; nuqs library for type-safe param management
Export queue CSV button → Server Action streaming CSV response from `scheduler_assignments` table filtered by current params
Status badges (AssnStatus component) → extract to shared `<AssignmentStatusBadge status={...} />` component using shadcn Badge with variant map
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `pending.*`

label: pext_capacity_projection
translation_notes: PEXT_CAPACITY_PROJECTION mock data → Drizzle query joining `scheduler_assignments` with `production_lines` to compute `SUM(qty_kg / duration_h) / line.cap_kg_h * 100` per line per day
Color-coded utilisation cells (>100% red, >90% amber, else green) → extract `utilColour(pct: number)` utility to `lib/capacity.ts`; replicate in both table cells and bar fills
Line utilisation bars section → shadcn Progress or custom div bars; use same `utilColour` utility for fill color class
V-SCHED-04 violation alert with specific line/day callouts → violations derived from query `WHERE pct > 100`; display as AlertDescription list
Refresh projection button → Server Action or SWR revalidation trigger; add `last_refreshed_at` timestamp from `scheduler_runs.completed_at`
Export CSV → Server Action streaming CSV of the same capacity_projection dataset
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `capacity.*`

label: pext_run_history
translation_notes: PEXT_RUNS mock data → Drizzle query `db.select().from(schedulerRuns).orderBy(desc(schedulerRuns.startedAt))` with type/status/date/user filter params via URL search params
4 KPI tiles (from PEXT_RUN_KPIS) → derived from aggregate query: count by status, avg duration; include in same loader fetch
Row click → next/navigation `router.push` to run detail page `/scheduler/runs/[runId]`; or inline selectedRun state for prototype fidelity
Re-run button disabled for failed runs and non-Planner role → RBAC in Server Action; also gate at button level via session role
Duration color coding (durCls: amber >60s, red >120s) → utility `runDurationVariant(dur: number): 'default' | 'warning' | 'destructive'` for Badge variant
Export CSV button → Server Action streaming CSV of filtered `scheduler_runs`
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `runHistory.*`

label: pext_run_detail
translation_notes: Dual-column run-detail-grid (metadata left / output summary right) → CSS Grid with responsive collapse; extract `<RunMetaCard>` and `<RunOutputCard>` as server components
PEXT_RUN_DETAIL mock → single Drizzle query `db.query.schedulerRuns.findFirst({ where: eq(id, runId), with: { assignments: true, overrides: true } })`
Input snapshot JSON link ('View full snapshot JSON →') → link to `/scheduler/runs/{runId}/snapshot.json` endpoint or inline collapsed `<pre>` with shadcn Collapsible
Per-line utilisation bars → derive from assignments aggregation; reuse `utilColour` utility from capacity projection
Override log items (oli-diff, oli-reason) → query `scheduler_assignment_overrides` joined to `override_reason_codes`; display as timeline with shadcn Timeline or Card list
Partial/failed run alert variants → map `run.status` to shadcn Alert variant ('warning' for partial, 'destructive' for failed)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `runDetail.*`

label: pext_scenarios
translation_notes: P2 feature gate → wrap entire interactive section in server-side `feature_flags.what_if_simulation` check; show upgrade/locked card when disabled
Scenario builder left panel + result right panel → two-column layout with shadcn ResizablePanel or fixed 340px/1fr grid
mods array local state (add/remove modifications) → useReducer with typed `ScenarioModification[]`; preset chips map to strongly-typed mod objects
runSim setTimeout canned deltas → real Server Action `runScenarioSimulationAction(scenarioId, mods)` calling solver with `dry_run: true` flag; poll for result
KPI compare grid (4×4: KPI / Baseline / Simulation / Delta) → shadcn Table with color-coded delta Badge per row
MiniGantt SVG → replace with shared mini-Gantt React component reusing GanttLane primitives from dashboard; render baseline vs scenario side-by-side
Saved scenarios list → Drizzle query `db.select().from(scenarios).orderBy(desc(createdAt))`; delete via Server Action with confirmation
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `scenario.*`
known_bugs: BL-PEXT-02: what-if simulation real solver hook-up is P2 (currently preset-driven + canned deltas)

label: pext_sequencing
translation_notes: v2 enhancement banner with rule ID → read `rule_registry.id` and `fallback_rule` from DB; avoid hardcoding rule IDs in component

4 KPI tiles (CO total, v1 baseline, CO reduction, cross-line moves) → aggregate query from `scheduler_assignments` joined to `changeover_matrix_cells`; target ≥30% saving from `optimizer_targets` table
Preview mode dry-run (previewRunState) → Server Action `previewSequenceAction(runId)` calling solver with dry_run=true flag; store result in `sequence_previews` table with 24h TTL
Sequence compare panels (baseline v1 / proposed v2) → Drizzle query `seq_baseline` and `seq_proposed` from `sequence_preview_rows`; `moved` flag highlighted with Badge
MOVED badge and saved Nm annotation → derive from diff between baseline and proposed row positions per line
Commit preview → Server Action `commitSequencePreviewAction(previewId)` writing to `scheduler_assignments` as draft status; emit `sequencing.preview.committed`
Sequence table (non-preview mode) → current v2 optimizer output from `scheduler_assignments` with allergen/CO/risk columns; CORisk badge uses same utility as capacity screen

label: pext_rules_screen
translation_notes: PEXT_RULES mock → Drizzle query `db.select().from(ruleRegistry).orderBy(asc(phase), asc(id))`; separate active/standby/disabled with filter
Active rules card list (rc-dsl, rc-desc, rc-meta) → shadcn Card per rule with Badge for status; 'View source →' button opens rule DSL in a Sheet/Dialog with syntax highlighting
Feature flags table → Drizzle query `db.select().from(featureFlags)` with `phase` column; ON/OFF Badge uses Badge variant='default'/'secondary'
Publish changes button (disabled for non-admin) → RBAC from session; admin publishes via Server Action `publishRuleAction(ruleId)` creating new rule version
Read-only for Planners → gate entire page with session role check in layout; redirect to dashboard if not Admin
invokes7d stat → aggregate from `scheduler_runs` where `started_at > now() - interval '7 days'`; join to rule invocation log
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `rules.*`

label: pext_settings_screen
translation_notes: 4-card 2-column grid layout → shadcn Card with 2-col CSS Grid; responsive collapse on tablet
Default run parameters form (horizon, refresh interval, forecast, solver timeout) → useForm with zod schema; Server Action `updateSchedulerSettingsAction` writing to `scheduler_config` table
Alerts config form (capacity threshold, stale schedule warning, override rate) → same pattern; separate `scheduler_alert_config` table or JSON config column
Integration card (solver URL, circuit breaker params) → Admin-only; fields disabled for non-admin; values from environment config not editable via UI in production (use env vars)
Premium status card → derive from `tenant_subscriptions` table; feature list is content, not data, so i18n keys suffice
14-day horizon option disabled → gate via feature flag `scheduler.horizon_14d.enabled`; show as disabled Select option with tooltip explanation
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys `settings.*`
